CustomField.description: AI-generated substantive determination written by the Comment Triage Agent. Read-only — do not edit. Human reviewers use nepa_is_substantive__c (human-only) to record the official determination. Separation required by OMB M-24-10: AI recommendations must not directly constitute adverse actions.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: AI recommendation only. Official determination is in Is Substantive (human-set).
CustomField.label: AI Substantive Recommendation
